request: Role 1: user-intent/completion-bar reviewer. DinoBrain OS unfinished improvement plan consensus review. Read and inspect at minimum: [REDACTED_MACHINE_LOCAL_PATH] relevant DinoBrain sections, [REDACTED_MACHINE_LOCAL_PATH] docs/OS_COMPLETION_IMPROVEMENT_PLAN.md, docs/VERIFICATION.md, [REDACTED_MACHINE_LOCAL_PATH] health_status.json, and relevant 40_Projects files in dinobrain-data. Also use rg to search the data repo for user desired direction around pre-response, direct MCP, native instruction, behavior recall, retrieval quality. Candidate plan: harden remaining gaps P0-04 direct MCP parity, P0-05 native instruction authority gate, P1-09 event-triggered behavior recall, P1-10 retrieval quality/real eval, and make completion conditions a document. Return AGREE only if you accept the plan and completion conditions; otherwise return REVISE_REQUIRED with exact changes needed. Do not edit files.

gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.
gates.safe_action: Do not store secrets or raw full transcripts; keep sync blocked until review.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
